articles.title: Lego’s Shrek Set Is Up For Preorder, Unfortunately So Is This Donkey
articles.title_tr: Lego’s Shrek Set Is Up For Preorder, Unfortunately So Is This Donkey
articles.summary: Shrek, Donkey, and Puss in Boots (1,403 pieces)                                                                                            $130 | Releases June 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Preorder at Lego Store                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Lego Shrek BrickHeadz: Shrek, Donkey, and Gingy (259 pieces)                                                                                            $25 | Releases June 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Preorder at Lego Store                                                                    Somebody once told us, the Lego world is going to troll us with a disturbing Shrek set. That prophecy has come true, as Lego has unveiled its new Shrek kit, capturing the Ogre and his pals in all their brick-built nightmare fuel glory. Available now to preorder ahead of its release on June 1, you can pick up this trio for $130, as well as a selection of Shrek BrickHeadz figures for $25.Shrek, Donkey, and Puss in Boots (1,403 pieces)$130 | Releases June 1Gallery                                                                                                                  See at Lego Store While Shrek looks marginally terrifying with his strangely shaped head, it's Donkey who steals the show. The fast-talking mule has been appropriately recreated in Lego, his face locked in an eternal rictus gaze that reminds you how the character doesn't have an off-switch. Puss in Boots is the cutest of the bunch, taking the form of a Lego minifigure that comes equipped with a stylish hat, sword, and rapier. The rest of the set includes a few nods to Shrek's swamp, including a keep out sign and a tile with a bog fly on it.Continue Reading at GameSpot
articles.summary_tr: Shrek, Donkey, and Puss in Boots (1,403 pieces)                                                                                            $130 | Releases June 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Preorder at Lego Store                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Lego Shrek BrickHeadz: Shrek, Donkey, and Gingy (259 pieces)                                                                                            $25 | Releases June 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Preorder at Lego Store                                                                    Somebody once told us, the Lego world is going to troll us with a disturbing Shrek set. That prophecy has come true, as Lego has unveiled its new Shrek kit, capturing the Ogre and his pals in all their brick-built nightmare fuel glory. Available now to preorder ahead of its release on June 1, you can pick up this trio for $130, as well as a selection of Shrek BrickHeadz figures for $25.Shrek, Donkey, and Puss in Boots (1,403 pieces)$130 | Releases June 1Gallery                                                                                                                  See at Lego Store While Shrek looks marginally terrifying with his strangely shaped head, it's Donkey who steals the show. The fast-talking mule has been appropriately recreated in Lego, his face locked in an eternal rictus gaze that reminds you how the character doesn't have an off-switch. Puss in Boots is the cutest of the bunch, taking the form of a Lego minifigure that comes equipped with a stylish hat, sword, and rapier. The rest of the set includes a few nods to Shrek's swamp, including a keep out sign and a tile with a bog fly on it.Continue Reading at GameSpot
articles.long_summary: Shrek, Donkey, and Puss in Boots (1,403 pieces)                                                                                            $130 | Releases June 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Preorder at Lego Store

articles.title: 'Godzilla World' Is Japan's Version of Hollywood's 'MonsterVerse' — and It Sounds Like Godzilla Minus One Is Just the Start
articles.title_tr: 'Godzilla World' Is Japan's Version of Hollywood's 'MonsterVerse' — and It Sounds Like Godzilla Minus One Is Just the Start
articles.summary: Godzilla is set to burst back on to theater screens in Godzilla Minus Zero in November this year. However, Toho has recently hinted that new plans are afoot for its legendary King of the Monsters. The giant kaiju will be getting “Godzilla World,” a plan to expand and interconnect the Japanese Godzilla’s universe in a similar way to what Hollywood's MonsterVerse franchise has done with its modern reboots of the American Godzilla and King Kong IPs.

The giant kaiju will be getting “Godzilla World,” a plan to expand and interconnect the Japanese Godzilla’s universe in a similar way to what Hollywood's MonsterVerse franchise has done with its modern reboots of the American Godzilla and King Kong IPs.

articles.title: This Week's Epic Games Store Freebie Is All About Doom And Blades
articles.title_tr: This Week's Epic Games Store Freebie Is All About Doom And Blades
articles.summary: The Epic Games Store continues to give away a free game each week, and this week's offering is another nice find at a price that can't be beat. Every Thursday at 8 AM PT / 11 AM ET, Epic offers at least one free PC game (and sometimes even as many as two or three). All you need to do to claim the free games is create a free Epic account and enable two-factor authentication. You have a week to add the freebies to your library before the new one(s) take their place. At this point, Epic has given away hundreds of free games, and there's no sign that the program will stop any time soon. The company has also extended its freebies to Android devices, and you can claim a free game every week here as well. We keep this article up to date weekly to highlight both the current free games and next week's offerings.If you're looking for more freebies, you can check out our list of the 25 best free PC games to play right now, or for more options, the 25 best free games to play on multiple platforms.Current free games at Epic Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: Storage Wars Star Darrell Sheets Dies Aged 67
articles.title_tr: Storage Wars Star Darrell Sheets Dies Aged 67
articles.summary: Darrell Sheets, one of the stars of the hit A&E reality series Storage Wars, has died at age 67. Sheets passed away on Wednesday, April 22 in Lake Havasu City, Arizona. Local police have since released information on how the reality TV personality died.

articles.title: Spider-Noir Villains Revealed: Exclusive First Look at the Show's Sandman, Tombstone and More
articles.title_tr: Spider-Noir Villains Revealed: Exclusive First Look at the Show's Sandman, Tombstone and More
articles.summary: Co-showrunner and executive producer Oren Uziel and his team put the needs of the story first when selecting the rogue’s gallery of Spider-Noir. That doesn’t mean they could use any Marvel character they wanted, as Uziel explained: “There are characters that you can't use."

articles.title: Adalet Bakanlığı'ndan önemli adım: Faili meçhul dosyalar için özel daire kuruldu
articles.title_tr: Adalet Bakanlığı'ndan önemli adım: Faili meçhul dosyalar için özel daire kuruldu
articles.summary: Adalet Bakanlığı, suçla mücadelede etkinliği artırmak amacıyla “ihtisaslaşma” sürecine geçerek Ceza İşleri Genel Müdürlüğü bünyesinde 7 yeni daire başkanlığı oluşturdu. Yeni yapılanmayla terör, örgütlü ve dijital suçlar, dezenformasyonla mücadele ile afet ve kazalara ilişkin alanlarda kurumsal kapasitenin güçlendirilmesi hedefleniyor.

articles.summary: New York borsası güne düşüşle başladı. Açılışta Dow Jones endeksi yüzde 0,41 azalarak 49.284,85 puana indi. S&P 500 endeksi yüzde 0,27 azalışla 7.118,8 puana ve Nasdaq endeksi yüzde 0,42 kayıpla 24.553,74 puana geriledi.

articles.title: Yalova’da Sessiz Yürüyüş Gerçekleştirdiler, Manifestolarını Açıkladılar
articles.title_tr: Yalova’da Sessiz Yürüyüş Gerçekleştirdiler, Manifestolarını Açıkladılar
articles.summary: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi İl Gençlik Kolları ve Kadın Kolları öncülüğünde bir araya gelen partililer, Yalova İl Millî Eğitim Müdürlüğü’ne kadar sessiz yürüyüş gerçekleştirdi. Müdürlük önünde söz alan CHP Yalova İl Başkanı Doğancı, geçtiğimiz hafta gerçekleştirilen okul saldırılarını hatırlattıktan sonra CHP’nin 23 maddelik eğitim manifestosunu açıkladı.

articles.title: DMM'den Türk bayrağına saygısızlık yapıldığı yönündeki iddialara yalanlama
articles.title_tr: DMM'den Türk bayrağına saygısızlık yapıldığı yönündeki iddialara yalanlama
articles.summary:
Dezenformasyonla Mücadele Merkezi (DMM) 23 Nisan Ulusal Egemenlik ve Çocuk Bayramı kutlamaları üzerinden sosyal medyada paylaşılan "Türk bayrağına saygısızlık yapıldığı" yönündeki iddiaların asılsız olduğunu belirtti.23 Nisan Ulusal Egemenlik ve Çocuk Bayramı kutlamaları kapsamında sosyal medyada paylaşılan "Türk bayrağına saygısızlık yapıldığı" yönündeki iddialara DDM'den yalanlama geldi.

DMM tarafından yapılan açıklamada:

“Kocaeli ili Körfez ilçesi Alparslan Türkeş Stadyumu’nda gerçekleştirilen kutlama programı kapsamında dev bir bayrak kareografisi gerçekleştirilmiştir. Gösterinin tamamlanmasının ardından, şeritler halindeki uzun parçalar, usulüne uygun ve düzenli bir şekilde muhafaza edilmek amacıyla rulo yapılmak üzere zemine serilmiştir.

Görevlilerin bayrağı toplama işlemi sırasında şeritlerin arasından geçerek tahliye işlemini gerçekleştirdiği; iddia edilenin aksine, şanlı Türk bayrağının üzerine basılmasının söz konusu dahi olmadığı tespit edilmiştir. Milli değerlerimizi ve toplumsal hassasiyetlerimizi istismar ederek; birlik, beraberlik ve kardeşlik ruhumuzu hedef alan bu tür kasıtlı ve art niyetli içerikler, kamuoyunda infial yaratma amacı taşıyan birer dezenformasyon girişimidir. Vatandaşlarımızın, bu tarz içeriklere karşı dikkatli olmaları ve yalnızca resmi makamlar tarafından yapılan açıklamalara itibar etmeleri önemle rica olunur.” İfadeleri kullanıldı.

articles.title: AI just discovered new physics in the fourth state of matter
articles.title_tr: AI just discovered new physics in the fourth state of matter
articles.summary: Physicists have taken a major step toward using AI not just to analyze data, but to uncover entirely new laws of nature. By combining a specially designed neural network with precise 3D tracking of particles in a dusty plasma—a strange “fourth state of matter” found from space to wildfires—the team revealed hidden patterns in how particles interact. Their model captured complex, one-way (non-reciprocal) forces with over 99% accuracy and even overturned long-held assumptions about how these forces behave.

articles.title: Multi-sourcing, MOSA, and producibility form next-level defense acquisition reform
articles.title_tr: Multi-sourcing, MOSA, and producibility form next-level defense acquisition reform
articles.summary: If the Pentagon wants more resilient supply chains, it must stop buying proprietary products and start building programs around multi-sourced and competitive projects.
